fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that created the warehouse put-away request.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the warehouse document that should be put away.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location in which the request is occurring.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the zone code where the bin on the request is located.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Completely Put Away
fields.tooltip: Specifies that all the items on the warehouse source document have been put away.
